name: ZED POP
description: The ZED POP uses the [[ZED]] StereoLabs SDK to scan and create geometry meshes (triangles) by moving it around the room or an object of interest. It also has the option to display a live point cloud from the depth image passed to it from the ZED TOP. After pressing start the ZED POP uses each frame of video to build up the mesh, with the preview of the captured points in the viewer. To know what ZED SDK we are using, refer to the [[ZED]] page. See also [[ZED]], [[ZED TOP]], [[ZED CHOP]] and [[ZED SOP]]

parameters.name: Active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Extra pass to free unused GPU memory.

parameters.name: ZED TOP
parameters.label: ZED TOP
parameters.description: Reference to a ZED TOP.

parameters.name: Output Mode
parameters.label: Output Mode
parameters.description: Whether to output a mesh or a point cloud.

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines whether and how to connect the points.

parameters.name: Initialize
parameters.label: Initialize
parameters.description: Clears the extracted geometry and resets spatial mapping.

parameters.name: Start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: Start playback.

parameters.name: Play
parameters.label: Play
parameters.description: Enable playback.

parameters.name: Go to Done
parameters.label: Go to Done
parameters.description: Will immediately go to the done state.

parameters.name: Preview
parameters.label: Preview
parameters.description: Camera preview mode.

parameters.name: Maximum Memory
parameters.label: Maximum Memory
parameters.description: Sets the maximum memory used for spatial mapping.

parameters.name: Resolution
parameters.label: Resolution
parameters.description: Spatial mapping resolution in meters.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.label: Range
parameters.description: Depth range in meters.

parameters.name: Normals
parameters.label: Normals
parameters.description: When enabled, the extracted geometry will have normals.

parameters.name: Color
parameters.label: Color
parameters.description: Output color information as an attribute.

parameters.name: Filter
parameters.label: Filter
parameters.description: The greater the filtering, the more the resulting mesh is smoothed, small holes are filled, and small blobs of non-connected triangles are deleted.

parameters.name: Perspective
parameters.label: Perspective
parameters.description: Camera perspective.

parameters.name: Rerange from Low High
parameters.label: Rerange from Low High
parameters.description: Range for input values.

parameters.name: Rerange to Low High
parameters.label: Rerange to Low High
parameters.description: Range for output values.

parameters.name: Mirror Image
parameters.label: Mirror Image
parameters.description: Mirrors the input image.

parameters.name: Camera
parameters.label: Camera
parameters.description: Specify the camera component.

parameters.name: Override Camera View
parameters.label: Override Camera View
parameters.description: When on, overrides the View settings from the selected camera object.

parameters.name: View Angle Method
parameters.label: View Angle Method
parameters.description: Sets the method to convert the depth TOP.

parameters.name: FOV Angle
parameters.label: FOV Angle
parameters.description: Determines the camera's field of view angle.

parameters.name: Optical Center (Cx, Cy)
parameters.label: Optical Center (Cx, Cy)
parameters.description: The location of the center of the camera for the depth projection.

parameters.name: Delete Near Points
parameters.label: Delete Near Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are close to the camera.

parameters.name: Near Depth
parameters.label: Near Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the near clipping plane.

parameters.name: Delete Far Points
parameters.label: Delete Far Points
parameters.description: Enable removal of points that are far from the camera.

parameters.name: Far Depth
parameters.label: Far Depth
parameters.description: Depth of the far clipping plane.
